title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.036 - Residency requirements for officers and board members of museum (Kansas City)
text:
92.036.  Residency requirements for officers and board members of museum (Kansas City). — The director and a majority of the officers of the board of governors of any museum in any city authorized to levy a tax under section 92.035 shall be residents of the state of Missouri and taxpayers of such city.
(L. 1977 S.B. 73 § 2)
